[23CIt is written in the Book of Thoth:

[27CAfter the Creation, the cruel god Moloch rebelled
[27Cagainst the authority of Marduk the Creator.
 lqqqk[21CMoloch stole from Marduk the most powerful of all
 x~[97mf@[39mx[21Cthe artifacts of the gods, the Amulet of Yendor,
 x~[94m{[93m$[39mx[21Cand he hid it in the dark cavities of Gehennom, the
 x~~[93m:[39mx[21CUnder World, where he now lurks, and bides his time.
 x~~~x
 x~~~x[17CYour god Thoth seeks to possess the Amulet, and with it
 mq~qj[17Cto gain deserved ascendance over the other gods.

[23CYou, a newly trained Evoker, have been heralded
[23Cfrom birth as the instrument of Thoth.  You are destined
[23Cto recover the Amulet for your deity, or die in the
[23Cattempt.  Your hour of destiny has come.  For the sake
[23Cof us all:  Go bravely with Thoth!
[23C--More--
